title: Shakspeare
content:
I see all human wits
    Are measured but a few;
    Unmeasured still my Shakspeare sits,
    Lone as the blessed Jew.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Shakspeare"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
